title: Immortal Celestial Body
content:
The 
Immortal Celestial Body
 is a unique body that originates from the Celestial Ancestor. Every member of the 
Celestial Clan
's royal/imperial family has this body, which in this generation is 
Lian Daofei
 and his older brother 
Lian Daozhen
, who are descendants of the Celestial Ancestor and thus share his bloodline. 

This body grants the user pseudo-invincibility from all forms of permanent injury. A possessor of the Immortal Celestial Body could have their entire being destroyed and as long as their soul remains intact, the body would reform back to peak condition. A demonstration of its indestructable capabilities was when Lian Daofei was devoured by the Nether Beast and had his divine sense destroyed. By the time Wang Lin meets him in the world inside the Nether Beast he is mentally insane, but his physical body showed no signs of any damage. However, while it is extremely difficult to permanently put down an individual with the Immortal Celestial Body, it is still possible. With the combined efforts of Grand Empyrean's Dao Yi, Wu Feng, Gemini, and Jiu Di, and Wang Lin, Lian Daozhen had his body completely destroyed. Afterwards, Wang Lin sealed his soul before his body could regenerate and later refined it to condense his Grand Empyrean Sun, killing him permanently.

The Immortal Celestial Body also imbues the users blood with special properties that can be used to heal others. They also have access to special blood that can bring a person back from the brink of death. However, according to Lian Daofei, his older brother mentions that this special blood should never be given lightly. That is because those who receive this special blood also receive the Celestial Ancestor's bloodline and if they can integrate with it properly, also receive the Immortal Celestial Body.

There are 3 Mark on the body from a True Immortal Celestial Body who are like the star of the Ancient Clan but is innate to the Immortal Celestial Body, unlike the Ancient Clan's acquired star. It help them strengthen spell, their comprehension talent 
(not sure)
, their phyqisue and energy quality, and both physical and energical regenerative power, it also change the color of both spell and energy in a golden color. 
(need verification to know their accurate emplacement)

When Wang Lin falls into the world of the Nether Beast, Lian Daofei who had gone mad healed him using the special blood containing the Celestial Ancestor's bloodline. The power clashed with Wang Lin's Ancient Clan Bloodline and nearly killed him. However, he managed to quell the clashing powers within him and in the end received both the Celestial Ancestor's bloodline and Immortal Celestial Body.

Later, while Wang Lin is trapped inside the false Planet Suzaku from Sovereign’s Fishing the Moon in the Well spell, the Sovereign forcibly separated the Celestial Immortal Body from Wang Lin’s Ancient body, condensing out into a drop of golden celestial blood. Wang Lin manages to keep ahold of this blood, storing it inside his forehead to use as a treasure in the future.
